tasks.name: Setup SAE experiment environment
tasks.description: Install sae-lens, transformer-lens, verify Gemma Scope SAE access. Check remote GPU availability.

tasks.name: H_Mech pilot: 2x2 factorial stochastic hierarchy (seed 42)
tasks.description: Pilot for H_Mech: 2x2 factorial (A/B/C/D) with stochastic hierarchy noise (epsilon ~ N(0, 0.05)). Validate B>D anomaly. 100 samples, seed 42.

pilot.pass_criteria: Condition B not significantly worse than D (delta < 0.05), Condition C not significantly better than A (delta < 0.05)

tasks.name: H_Mech full: 2x2 factorial with 5 seeds
tasks.description: Full H_Mech validation: 2x2 factorial across 5 seeds (42, 123, 456, 789, 1024). Stochastic hierarchy. Total 20 runs. Validate B>D anomaly robustness.

visualizations.description: H_Mech 2x2 factorial with error bars across 5 seeds

tasks.name: H_Comp pilot: hierarchy strength sweep (3 levels)
tasks.description: Pilot for H_Comp: hierarchy strength sweep at 3 cosine similarity levels (0.6, 0.8, 0.95). 100 samples, seed 42.

pilot.pass_criteria: Absorption monotonically increases with hierarchy strength (no reversal)

tasks.name: H_Comp full: hierarchy strength sweep (6 levels, 3 seeds)
tasks.description: Full H_Comp: 6 cosine similarity levels (0.5, 0.6, 0.7, 0.8, 0.9, 0.95) × 3 seeds. Fit monotonic curve, report R².

visualizations.description: H_Comp absorption vs hierarchy strength with monotonic fit

tasks.name: H_Safe pilot: validated safety features on Gemma Scope
tasks.description: Pilot for H_Safe: Use Neuronpedia-validated safety features (deception, jailbreak, harm). 5 safety + 5 non-safety features from Gemma Scope layer 12. CRITICAL: No arbitrary indices.

pilot.pass_criteria: Safety and non-safety absorption distributions are measurable (not both zero)

visualizations.description: H_Safe safety vs non-safety absorption distributions

tasks.name: H_Safe full: 20 validated safety + 20 non-safety features
tasks.description: Full H_Safe: 20 validated safety-relevant features from Neuronpedia + 20 matched non-safety. Mann-Whitney U test. Measure absorption via multi-child proportional method.

visualizations.description: H_Safe full: 20+20 safety vs non-safety absorption

tasks.name: H_Downstream pilot: matched pair steering test
tasks.description: Pilot for H_Downstream: Test whether absorbed features show degraded steering utility. Match 5 absorbed + 5 non-absorbed pairs on confounders (activation frequency, magnitude). CRITICAL: This tests contrarian's core challenge.

pilot.pass_criteria: Absorbed vs non-absorbed steering difference > 5% (preliminary signal)

visualizations.description: H_Downstream: steering accuracy vs absorption status

tasks.name: H_Downstream full: 30 matched pairs, McNemar's test
tasks.description: Full H_Downstream: 30 absorbed + 30 matched non-absorbed feature pairs. Test steering accuracy and circuit completeness. McNemar's test for paired proportions. Falsification: <10% difference means absorption doesn't matter downstream.

visualizations.description: H_Downstream: steering accuracy by absorption status (30 pairs)

tasks.name: Held-out validation on GPT-2 Small
tasks.description: Validate key findings (H_Mech factorial + H_Safe subset) on GPT-2 Small SAE as held-out test. Compare with Gemma findings for cross-model robustness.

visualizations.description: Cross-model comparison: Gemma 2B vs GPT-2 Small
